name: pos-and-brilink-application
description: Aplikasi POS dan BRILink dengan dukungan printer thermal, scanner barcode, dan auto-update

scripts.dev:electron: npm run compile:electron && cross-env ELECTRON_DEV=1 concurrently "next dev" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && electron ."
scripts.build:web: node scripts/pre-build.js && next build && node scripts/post-build.js
scripts.build:electron: npm run build:web && npm run compile:electron && electron-builder --win
scripts.build:electron:portable: npm run build:web && npm run compile:electron && electron-builder --win portable
scripts.build:electron:publish: npm run build:web && npm run compile:electron && electron-builder --win -p always
scripts.dev:electron:update-sim: npm run compile:electron && cross-env ELECTRON_DEV=1 ELECTRON_UPDATE_SIMULATION=1 concurrently "next dev" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && electron ."
scripts.release:check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build && npm run compile:electron && npm audit --audit-level=moderate
scripts.release:win: npm run release:check && npm run build:electron
scripts.release:publish: npm run release:check && npm run build:electron:publish
